landing.title1: Turn a single UI image into
landing.subtitle: AI analyzes UI screenshots, separates layers, extracts text, restores backgrounds, and generates PSD files.
landing.freeTrial: 3 free conversions per month without sign up
landing.feat1Desc: Automatically separate buttons, cards, icons, and backgrounds into layers
landing.feat2Desc: Auto-detect font size, color, alignment to create editable text layers
landing.feat3Desc: Natural inpainting after removing text and icons
landing.feat4Desc: Edit directly in Photoshop with organized group structure
landing.ctaBottomSub: AI creates editable drafts ready for production

register.title: Sign Up
register.subtitle: Start for free
register.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

upload.title: Upload Image
upload.subtitle: Upload a UI image to convert it to a PSD file
upload.dragText: Drag or click to upload PNG, JPG, WebP
upload.pasteHint: Paste from clipboard with Ctrl+V | Max 20MB
upload.limitDesc: Log in for more conversions, or upgrade your plan for unlimited access.
upload.invalidType: Only PNG, JPG, WebP files are supported.
upload.tooLarge: File size must be 20MB or less.

footer.description: AI converts UI images into editable PSD layer files
footer.notice: Results are production-ready editing drafts. AI analysis does not guarantee perfect restoration.
